	{"bbox_2d": [390, 240, 740, 321], "text_content": "Cycle the connector between 25 °C ±3 °C at 80 % ±3% RH and 65 °C ±3 °C at 50 % ±3% RH. 	{"bbox_2d": [743, 240, 942, 321], "text_content": "Contact Resistance: 50mΩ Max."},

	{"bbox_2d": [170, 325, 387, 406], "text_content": "Salt Spray"},
	{"bbox_2d": [390, 325, 740, 406], "text_content": "Subject mated connectors to 5±1% salt-solution concentration, 35±2°C for 24 hours. In accordance with EIA-364-26, Test Condition B."},
	{"bbox_2d": [743, 325, 942, 406], "text_content": "Shall meet visual requirements, No detrimental corrosion allowed in contact area and base metal exposed."},

	{"bbox_2d": [390, 410, 740, 491], "text_content": "Temperature range from -55°C~+85°C .Start from -55°C. After 30 min. change to +85°C, change time is no more than 5min. Total 10 cycles. Test reference standard: EIA 364-32, test condition I"},
	{"bbox_2d": [743, 410, 942, 491], "text_content": "No physical damage. Contact Resistance (Low Level) 50m max."},

	{"bbox_2d": [170, 495, 387, 576], "text_content": "Solderability"},
	{"bbox_2d": [390, 495, 740, 576], "text_content": "Solder pot temperature: 250±5°C for 3~5 seconds. In accordance with EIA-364-52."},
	{"bbox_2d": [743, 495, 942, 576], "text_content": "95% of immersed area must show no voids, pin holes."},

	{"bbox_2d": [390, 615, 740, 661], "text_content": "105° C without applied voltage for 72 hours. EIA-364-17, method A"},
